aPrioriDNS.process_file

aPrioriDNS.process_file(file_path)

Read a binary file and convert its contents into a numpy array.

The function uses numpy’s fromfile function to read a binary file and convert its contents into a numpy array. The data type of the elements in the output array is set to ‘<f4’, which represents a little-endian single-precision float.

Parameters:

file_pathstr

The path to the file to be processed.

Returns:

:

numpy.ndarray:

The numpy array obtained from the file contents.
